pack.linkedin: Qualys' integration with Project Glasswing has yielded a 25% reduction in threat detection time. However, implementing Glasswing requires 12 additional hours of security team training and customized settings to reduce false positives by 28%. For instance, customizing Glasswing for AI workloads can cut audit time from 120 to 72 hours.
